---
title: "Privacy"
---

## Privacy Notice

ECLIPSE Lab is committed to collecting as little personal data as possible.

### What we collect

- Basic aggregated website analytics (Google Analytics) to understand overall site usage.
- Information you voluntarily provide when contacting us (for example by email).

### What we do not do

- We do not sell personal data.
- We do not use advertising trackers.

### Contact

If you have privacy questions, please use the contact details on the [Contact](contact.qmd) page.
